name: hermes-codex-bridge
description: Deploy and operate a safe Telegram approval bridge for Codex CLI tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Safe Telegram approvals for Codex CLI tasks.
interface.longDescription: Guide Codex through deploying, verifying, and troubleshooting hermes-codex-bridge: a Telegram + Hermes approval layer for Codex CLI with read-only planning, explicit write/commit/push approvals, task branches, and a hard rule that ordinary chat never enters the task queue.
defaultPrompt: 检查 Telegram bridge 为什么没响应
验证 V3 显式审批是否安全
